message:
feat(migration): implement M5 cutover marker emission and backend selector switch

Adds m5_cutover() to MigrationEngine: emits LifecycleMarker event with
migration metadata to target (using Fsync durability), verifies target
health post-activation, retains source path for rollback window.
Includes CutoverResult struct and 7 new tests (48 total).

Closes ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.3.1.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
